intro: Zygocarpum dhofarense, also known as Dhofari Zygocarpum, is a plant species belonging to the family Aristolochiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities that can aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
